claim: A bounded coding-agent proposal can be rehearsed against a temporary workspace copy while repository promotion remains blocked on review.

input.intent: Ask a local coding agent to prepare a bounded source change while the host controls capabilities and promotion.

fileState.after:
export const policyMode = "fail-fast";
export const reviewRequired = true;

receipts.reason: network access is not part of the default grant
the rehearsal may write only to a temporary workspace copy until an operator promotes the reviewed patch

promotionBoundary.canSay: The POC now rehearses the proposed coding-agent change against a temporary workspace copy and preserves the same review packet shape before promotion.
promotionBoundary.cannotSay: The rehearsal executed a real model-driven coding agent, proved complete repository sandboxing, or promoted unattended writes.

nextPromotion: Replace the deterministic planner with a real model/tool harness that must emit the same temporary-workspace rehearsal packet before any repository write is considered.
